rawText:
Rafael Curi Hilsenrath 
Plievierpark 16 • Munich, 81737 • rafael.curi-hilsenrath@tum.de • +49 163 1774875 • www.linkedin.com/in/rafael-curi- 
hilsenrath 
Nationality: Brazilian and Polish 
Education 
Technical University of Munich Munich 
B.Sc. Information Systems 
5th semester 
10.2023 - Present 
 
University of São Paulo (USP) Sao Paulo, Brazil 
B.Sc. Business Administration 
1 semester 
02.2023 – 08.2023 
 
Colégio Visconde de Porto Seguro (German School in São Paulo) 
Foreign Abitur; Average grade: 1.9 
Sao Paulo, Brazil 
Graduation Date: 
10.2022 
 
Experience 
 
Development Assistant at Canon   Munich, Germany 
Working student 10.2025 – Present 
 Responsible for Quality Planning and Validation of printing software systems 
 Develop and maintain Shell scripts for test automation and system validation 
 Perform manual testing and quality assurance, working in a Scrum environment using Azure DevOps 
 
TUM IT Operations Helpdesk Munich, Germany 
Hilfswissenschaftler 10.2024 – 08.2025 
 First point of contact for IT problems (hardware/software) for students and employees 
 Processing requests regarding workstations, printers, Wi-Fi and VPN 
 Maintaining the wiki database for quick resolution of frequent IT queries 
 
Neuron DS&AI Ribeirão Preto, Brazil 
Trainee 02.2023 – 08.2023 
 Training in Python and Power BI for project development 
 Analyzing and cleaning data sets with Python/Pandas 
 Creating interactive Power BI dashboards for presentations 
 
 
Programming projects 
 
SEBA Mobility Services – Backend Development (github.com/RDMRafs/SEBA- 
Mobility-Services-project) 
University project 
2024 
Java, Spring Boot, JPA/Hibernate  
 Development of a backend system for managing customers, employees, vehicles, rentals and invoices as part of a 
university project in collaboration with a fellow student 
 Implementing REST APIs for CRUD operations with Spring Boot and data persistence with JPA/Hibernate 
Knowledge 
 Technical: Java, Python, Power BI, R, SQL, Linux, Shell scripting, AzureDevOps, Git, Microsoft Office 
 Language: Portuguese (native), German (C1), English (B2), Spanish (B2) 
 Certificates and awards: Quant Challenge Itaú 2024 (financial competition with a focus on quantitative analysis), 
KPMG Audit Summer Clash 2025 (audit/business competition), HackaTUM 2025- Optiver trading bot 
 
Soft skills 
 Proactive 
 Team player 
 Communicative 
 Problem-solving skills 
 
Additional information 
 Honorable Mention at POSMUN (UN Simulation) as a delegate, recognized for clear and persuasive communication 
skills 
 Tutoring elementary school children, improving my organizational skills and ability to explain ideas clearly 
 Volunteered with street children in Senegal, working as part of a team to renovate the children’s school 
 Extensive football experience with participation in European championships; as the only English speaker in the 
team, took responsibility in unexpected situations
